creator: yasu@asuka.net
text:
In default setting, /usr/local/etc/rc.d/syslog-ng cannot start syslog-ng with error:
  "syslog-ng: WARNING: /usr/local/etc/syslog-ng/syslog-ng.conf is not readable."

Fix: 

In files/syslog-ng.sh.in,
  required_files=%%PREFIX%%/etc/syslog-ng/syslog-ng.conf
should be:
  required_files=%%PREFIX%%/etc/syslog-ng.conf
How-To-Repeat: starts syslog-ng by executing /usr/local/etc/rc.d/syslog-ng.
